song_name: Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Loved - Dean Lewis - Be Alright
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to save me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
This all or nothing really got a way of driving me crazy[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
I need somebody to heal, somebody to know, somebody to have, somebody to hold[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
It's easy to say but it's never the same[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]F[/ch]
I guess I kinda liked the way you numbed all the pain[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Now the day bleeds into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
And you're not here to get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I let my guard down and then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                    [ch]F[/ch]
   So I asked to look back at all the messages you’d sent[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
   And I know it wasn’t right but it was fucking with my head[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
   And everything deleted like the past year was gone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
   And when I touched your face I could tell you're moving on[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
  But it’s not the fact that you kissed him yesterday[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
It’s the feeling of betrayal, that I just can't seem to shake[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
And everything I know tells me that I should walk away[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
But I just want to stay…[/tab]

And my friends said…

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
   I know you love her but it’s over mate[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
   It doesn’t matter, put the phone away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
   It’s never easy to walk away[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
   But let her go oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
   It’ll be okay[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
  It's gonna hurt for a bit of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
  So, bottoms up, let’s forget tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
   You’ll find another and you’ll be just fine[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Let her go oh oh oh[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And I tend to close my eyes but it hurts sometimes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
I fall into your arms[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be safe in your sound 'til I come back around[/tab]


[Quiet Bridge/Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
For now the day bleeds into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
And you're not here to get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Coz nothing heals[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
The past like time.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And they can't steal[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
The love you’re born to find[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Now the day bleeds into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
And you're not here to get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
I let my guard down and then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]
